---
title: "Ines Benachir: Life Cycle Analysis and Ecodesign of PV Panels"
description: ""
image: /files/headshots/ines-benachir.jpeg
author: "Climate Guest Speakers"
date: "2025-04-28"
categories: [Climate and Environment, Climate and Energy, Climate and Sustainability]
#page-layout: full
#bibliography: references.bib
#csl: chicago-syllabus.csl
#suppress-bibliography: true
#link-citations: false
#citations-hover: false
listing:  #an example of listing external links
#  template: item-default-external.ejs
- id: speaker
  sort: "date asc"
  type: grid
  fields: [image, title, subtitle]
  grid-item-align: center
  grid-columns: 2
  image-height: 300px
#  categories: true
#  sort-ui: true
#  filter-ui: true
  contents:
    - path: https://linkedin.com/in/ines-benachir  #linkedin profile or personal website
      image: /files/headshots/ines-benachir.jpeg
      title: "Ines Benachir"
#      author: 
      subtitle: "ESG Manager at LONGi Solar"
#      date: "2024-03-12"
#      categories: [] 
page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
#toc: false
---

## Title

Life Cycle Analysis and Ecodesign of PV Panels


### Time

Monday, April 28, 2025 

3:00 PM - 4:00 PM ET / 9:00 PM - 10:00 PM CET  (Please note this is a different time than our normal class schedule)

### Venue 
Online via zoom. Please [register](https://forms.gle/65hnhJPmnYaz5utG9) to participate.

## About

Ines will present an introduction to life cycle assessment for solar panels, the emerging ecodesign norms and standards in Europe, and the best practices.


## Speaker

:::{#speaker}
:::


### Bio

Ines Benachir is the ESG Manager at LONGi Solar 


<!--Include social share buttons-->

{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
